# defaultPerformanceMetrics

**Type Property**

An array of default performance metrics the test records.

## Declaration

```swift
class var defaultPerformanceMetrics: [XCTPerformanceMetric] { get }
```

## Discussion

When you call [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestCase/measure(_:)], the test uses this property to determine which performance metrics to record. The default is an array that contains [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTPerformanceMetric/wallClockTime]. Subclasses of [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestCase] can override this method to change the behavior of [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestCase/measure(_:)].

## Related Documentation

- **wallClockTime**: A performance metric that records the time in seconds to execute a block of code.

## Measuring Performance

- **measure(_:)**: Measures the performance of a block of code.
- **measureMetrics(_:automaticallyStartMeasuring:for:)**: Measures the performance of a block of code, optionally deferring the starting point for measurement.
- **measure(metrics:block:)**: Records the selected metrics for a block of code.
- **measure(metrics:options:block:)**: Records the selected metrics, using the specified measurement options, for a block of code.
- **measure(options:block:)**: Records the performance, using the specified measurement options, for a block of code.
- **startMeasuring()**: Starts recording performance metrics within a block of code.
- **stopMeasuring()**: Ends recording performance metrics within a block of code.
- **defaultMetrics**: An array of default metrics the test uses to record performance.
- **defaultMeasureOptions**: The default measurement options the test uses to record performance.
- **XCTPerformanceMetric**: Performance metrics that the test records.
